hero.description: A motivated fresher frontend developer with a strong interest in building user-friendly and accessible web applications. Currently focused on mastering modern frontend technologies, with a long-term goal of becoming a full-stack developer.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a passionate developer with a strong foundation in web development and a keen eye for creating engaging user experiences.

frontend.title: Front-End Mastery with React.js – 10+ Real-World Projects
frontend.company: Cybersoft – in collaboration with Hutech University
frontend.description:
Completed 10+ real-world web development projects from basic to advanced using React.js, JavaScript ES6, HTML5, and CSS3.

Gained proficiency in component-based architecture, state management with React Hooks, and API integration.

Applied popular libraries such as React Router, Axios, Bootstrap/Tailwind CSS.

Developed skills in requirement analysis, UI optimization, and project deployment.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: Here are some of my recent works

warehouse.description: A comprehensive web application for managing warehouse operations, including inventory tracking and order management.

cinema.title: Web Cinema ticket booking
cinema.description: A responsive web application for booking cinema tickets online.

game.title: Web Game Online
game.description: An online platform for playing and purchasing video games, featuring user reviews and ratings.
